title: Luminax
description: Adds a bunch of simple glowing blocks to the game
body:
This mod adds a handful of single-colored blocks to the game. It's similar to AntiblocksReChiseled, but please note that this mod is not a fork or copy, it's 100% original code.

This mod was made to serve as a replacement of Antiblocks in All the Mods 10, but can be freely used in any pack

Currently included blocks are:
- Full block
- Slab
- Stair
- Wall
- Pressure plate
- Button

![Luminax Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f75afb784b0537be1adf0bcc6e4a7d2757799a17.png)
